title: Through The Valley We Rise

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: You shook the earth beneath our feet
Left us scattered, incomplete
The ground still trembles where we stand
As cracks spread through this broken land
But we are Yours, we bear Your name
Though we stumble through this pain

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Raise Your banner high
Let truth unfold across the sky
With God we'll rise and find our way
Through darkest night into the day
Our strength, our shield, our victory
Only You can set us free

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: We drank the wine that made us reel
Staggering blind, too numb to feel
But those who fear You found a sign
A refuge in these troubled times
Now hear our cry from distant shores
As we kneel before Your doors

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Raise Your banner high
Let truth unfold across the sky
With God we'll rise and find our way
Through darkest night into the day
Our strength, our shield, our victory
Only You can set us free

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Who will lead us to the city strong?
Who will right what has gone wrong?
Not our armies, not our might
Only You can win this fight

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Though You rejected us before
Your love will open every door
March with us through valley deep
Your promises You always keep
With God we'll do great valiant things
For He treads down everything

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Raise Your banner high
Let truth unfold across the sky
With God we'll rise and find our way
Through darkest night into the day
Our strength, our shield, our victory
Only You can set us free
Raise Your banner high
Let truth unfold across the sky
Our strength, our shield, our victory
Only You can set us free

epigraph: Through God we shall do valiantly
